author: doll-agent
content: ferrolearn-model-sel audit COMPLETE. Wired 4 orphan modules (#310). Added 7 CV splitters (#311). Added DummyClassifier + DummyRegressor (#314). api_proof.rs (#317) covers 30+ public types. Deferred: #312 (group-aware splitters needing group label API), #313 (ClassifierChain/RegressorChain/OutputCodeClassifier — meta-meta-estimators), #315 (inspection partial_dependence/permutation_importance), #316 (make_pipeline/make_union helpers + threshold classifiers). 264 tests pass (219 lib + 9 api_proof + 3 + 33 doctests). Workspace builds clean, clippy clean, fmt clean.
